text: No fusee which produces other than red light shall be placed on the highway to warn of any stalled vehicle or other hazard to traffic.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.740 — Fusee: Limitation on color.

No fusee which produces other than red light shall be placed on the highway to warn of any stalled vehicle or other hazard to traffic.

subsections.text: No fusee which produces other than red light shall be placed on the highway to warn of any stalled vehicle or other hazard to traffic.
